briefdescription.para: the user can directly manipulate the vector, anyway she cannot break anything
creates a vector with size elements with default value Generated from constructor MR::Vector<MR::WatershedGraph::BasinInfo, MR.GraphVertId>::Vector.
creates a vector with size elements with the given value Generated from constructor MR::Vector<MR::WatershedGraph::BasinInfo, MR.GraphVertId>::Vector.
moves data from the given std::vector<T> Generated from constructor MR::Vector<MR::WatershedGraph::BasinInfo, MR.GraphVertId>::Vector.
doubles reserved memory until resize(newSize) can be done without reallocation Generated from method MR::Vector<MR::WatershedGraph::BasinInfo, MR.GraphVertId>::resizeWithReserve.
doubles reserved memory until resize(newSize, value) can be done without reallocation Generated from method MR::Vector<MR::WatershedGraph::BasinInfo, MR.GraphVertId>::resizeWithReserve.

sets elements [pos, pos+len) to the given value, adjusting the size of the vector to include new elements; the elements in between old size and pos are also set to val (for faster implementation) Generated from method MR::Vector<MR::WatershedGraph::BasinInfo, MR.GraphVertId>::autoResizeSet.
sets the element #i to the given value, adjusting the size of the vector to include new element Generated from method MR::Vector<MR::WatershedGraph::BasinInfo, MR.GraphVertId>::autoResizeSet.
this accessor automatically adjusts the size of the vector Generated from method MR::Vector<MR::WatershedGraph::BasinInfo, MR.GraphVertId>::autoResizeAt.
moves data from the given std::vector<T> Generated from constructor MR::Vector<MR::WatershedGraph::BasinInfo, MR.GraphVertId>::Vector.
std::vector<T>-like container that requires specific indexing type,

parameterdescription.para: type of index (shall be convertible to size_t) Generated from class MR::Vector<MR::WatershedGraph::BasinInfo, MR.GraphVertId>. This is the non-const half of the class.
